change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
Mobilization of the Health Facility Operation and Management Committee
	Geological assessment of health posts; newly constructed and existing health posts at critical locations
	Detailed assessment of health posts which are repaired or retrofitted including BOQ
	Supervision of construction process in cooperation with Health Facility Operation and Management Committee
	Rehabilitation or construction of water supply systems for health posts
	Conduct one joint infrastructural audit of all rebuilt health posts with government and stakeholders
	Handing over of health posts to the community, health workers and district health office
	Mass media campaign on safe motherhood designed and implemented through community radio
	Formation/reformation of VCPC in the targeted VDCs
	Structural support to establish equipment for office set up
	Direct support by the project to victims of very severe Child Protection violations or children at very high risk, which cannot (yet) be managed by the local structures
	Provide emergency fund support to VCPCs
	Promote women's groups and mothers groups as a source for identifying vulnerable children
	Meeting with community stakeholders and local authorities to prevent and respond to abuse, neglect, violence and exploitation of children
	Mobilize child club on awareness raising on child protection to prevent and minimize the child protection risks in the areas
	Conduct awareness campaign on child protection in the district through child club networks, CBOs and DCWB
	Facilitate to develop strategic plan of DCWB
	TV documentary production and broadcast

en.full: Rehabilitating Community Health and Protection Services following the 2015 Earthquake

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
